underlying_goal: Add a web service layer (FastAPI + frontend) to an existing CLI tool (maimai-assistant) so a small team can use it via browser, then update docs and commit
friction_detail: Python 3.9 type hint syntax (X | None) was used instead of Optional[X], caught during import check and fixed.
brief_summary: User asked to implement a full web service layer for their CLI tool per a detailed plan, update docs, and push commits; Claude created 27+ files with ~2800 lines and completed all requests successfully.
